title: BEM-841 route after 839
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:01 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem839_verify_after_response_retry_tick.json')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
if not missing:
    status='triad_present_process_protocol'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
elif missing[0]=='workflow_dispatch_results':
    status='repair_dispatch_results_mobile_safe'
    next_action='fix repo-side queue processor/result writer; no operator local setup'
elif missing[0]=='claude_runtime_state':
    status='repair_claude_runtime_mobile_safe'
    next_action='repair Claude dispatcher runtime state writer; no operator local setup'
else:
    status='repair_real_claude_response_mobile_safe'
    next_action='repair Claude response writer/provider path; no operator local setup'
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':status,'bem839_status':prev.get('status'),'missing':missing,'next_action':next_action,'mobile_first_rule':'operator phone only; no local setup token','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem841_route_after_bem839_mobile_first.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_route_after_bem839_mobile_first.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Route After BEM-839 Mobile First | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Mobile-first: no local setup token.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Missing: '+', '.join(missing)+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem841_route_after_bem839_mobile_first.json','governance/reports/bem841_route_after_bem839_mobile_first.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-839 using the new mobile-first no-local-setup rule')
